name: Tavern Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 Pouch Soup Mix (Campbell's Onion Mushroom Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the beef into a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole dish.
2. Stir in chili powder and minced garlic. Cover with lid.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 5 minutes or until the beef is no longer pink, stirring once during cooking to break up the meat.
4. Spoon off any excess fat.
5. Stir in the soup mix, beer or water, tomatoes (with their liquid), and beans. Cover.
6. Microwave on HIGH for an additional 3 minutes or until hot and bubbling.
7. Stir again.
8. Reduce power to 50%. Cover; microwave for 10 minutes or until flavors are well blended, stirring once during cooking.
9. Let stand, covered, for 5 minutes.
10. Garnish with shredded Cheddar Cheese and Sour Cream.
